initial.bodySample:
KimCad
1
Welcome
2
Your AI model
3
Your printer
4
Direct printing
5
Ready

Most first prints are ready in under 15 minutes.

Skip setup
Welcome to KimCad

Describe a part in plain words — or photograph one — and get a print-ready file in minutes. It runs on your computer; nothing leaves your machine unless you choose to. Let’s get you set up.

Pick the AI model that turns your words into a design.
Choose the printer your parts are checked against.
Decide how you want to get your files.
Continue
KimCad
Bambu Lab P2S
256×256×256 mm
My Designs
Settings
?
Ready to print in ~15 minutes · no CAD skills
What do you want to make today?

Describe a functional part in plain words — I’ll design it, check that it’s actually printable, and get it ready for your printer. Runs entirely on your machine.

Design it
Describe with a photo
TRY
a wall-mounted holder for a 1 kg filament spool
a 40 mm desk cable clip
a hexagonal pen and tool organizer

1. Describe
2. Preview & refine
3. Check & download
